get.description: Return application health status and version.

get.description: Browse/search skills with filters, sorting, and pagination.
List all available categories.

get.description: Get full skill detail by slug.
List all published versions for a skill. Auth required.

Get specific version content for a skill. Auth required.

Get current user's forked skills.
Get current user's skill submissions with status.

Favorite a skill (idempotent upsert).
Fork a skill.
Follow the author of a skill (idempotent upsert).

delete.description: Unfollow the author of a skill.

get.description: Get paginated reviews sorted by helpful_count DESC.

post.description: Create a review. 409 if already reviewed.
Vote on a review (helpful/unhelpful).

get.description: Get paginated comments with nested replies.

delete.description: Soft delete a comment (owner or platform team).

Upvote a comment (idempotent).
Create a new skill submission and run Gate 1 validation.

post.description: Trigger Gate 2 LLM scan on a submission. Platform/Security team only.

get.description: List all submissions. Platform team only.

post.description: Gate 3 human review. Platform team only.

post.description: Request access to a skill from a different division.

get.description: List all access requests. Platform team only.

post.description: Review a division access request. Platform team only.

schema.title: Response Review Access Request Endpoint Api V1 Admin Access Requests  Request Id  Review Post

get.description: Return all feature flags with division overrides applied.

post.description: Create a new feature flag. Platform team only.

patch.description: Update an existing feature flag. Platform team only.

delete.description: Delete a feature flag. Platform team only.

post.description: Set featured status on a skill. Platform Team only.
Deprecate a skill. Platform Team only.

delete.description: Soft-remove a skill. Security Team only. Writes audit log.

schema.title: Response Recalculate Trending Endpoint Api V1 Admin Recalculate Trending Post

get.description: Query audit log. Platform Team only.
List users with optional filters. Platform Team only.

post.description: Claim a submission for review.
Make a review decision on a submission.
Request a new data export job.

schema.title: Response Export Status Api V1 Admin Exports  Job Id  Get

post.description: Submit feedback. Any authenticated user.
